entryCondition: The product owner directly requested the next MVP scope, detailed specification, documentation update, and complete implementation on 2026-07-21. The roadmap and prior exclusions assign terrain to Phase 5 after UPD-002 pack evidence.
note: UPD-003 adds an optional terrain document and archive-v3 reader/writer above the implemented baseline. It does not rewrite character, humanoid pack, project.json schema-v2, archive-v1/v2, or existing export semantics.
